positive: Minimalist geometric celestial forest landscape, highly stylized vector art print. A central silhouette of interconnected, stylized trees with glowing nebula patterns filling their canopies. The ground features abstract, crystalline formations forming a subtle, repeating pattern. Color palette is restricted to deep midnight blues, cosmic violets, electric teal accents, and shimmering gold foil effects. Emphasize high contrast and clean, graphic edges suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Composition must be centered and symmetrical. Dreamy, ethereal, and modern.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, complex textures, noisy, blur, graffiti, text, signature, watermark, grain, logos, trademarks, out of focus, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy
